headline: Delta hikes its baggage fees to offset rising jet fuel costs
summary: Delta Air Lines (DAL) — alongside competitors United Airlines (UAL) and JetBlue Airways (JBLU) — is hiking baggage its baggage fees to offset rising jet fuel costs.Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Pras Subramanian breaks down the new airline rules and policies.

headline: Jet fuel supply concerns grow as war with Iran drags on, airlines cut flights
summary: Fuel prices have nearly doubled in the U.S. since the United States and Israel attacked Iran.
